core_mechanism: Selection of a 'confidence set' of competing predictors by comparing their out-of-sample loss differentials with pairwise and multi-model significance tests, retaining all models statistically indistinguishable from the best-performing one under a chosen loss
brief_reason: The paper's whole method rests on 'formal pairwise and multi-model forecast-comparison tests' and a 'Model Confidence Set' that keeps every model not significantly worse than the best, which is a domain-neutral model-selection-by-loss-differential procedure.
